steps.title: Put the equations in matching form
steps.content:
Rewrite the first equation:
$$
8+5r=pw
$$
$$
5r-pw=-8
$$
Rewrite the second equation:
$$
5r-4w=4w+13
$$
$$
5r-8w=13
$$

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content: For no solution, the left sides must be proportional but the constants must differ. The $r$-coefficients already match, so the $w$-coefficients must match: $$ -p=-8 $$ Thus $p=8$. The answer is 8.
